title: Beginning with mercy
body: This opening teaches the believer to begin every meaningful action by remembering Allah and His mercy. It frames knowledge, worship, and daily life with humility and reliance.

title: Praise, mercy, and accountability
body: These ayat gather the believer between gratitude, hope, and awareness of the Day of Recompense. NOOR will later support long-form tafseer entries and ayah ranges.

title: Worship and guidance
body: The servant declares worship for Allah alone and asks for guidance. This becomes the daily heart of Muslim practice and learning.
